L1_headline: HOLX – Approved revised RSU Award Agreement form. | 11/07/25
L2_brief: On November 4, 2025, Hologic's Compensation Committee approved a revised form of Restricted Stock Unit Award Agreement for fiscal 2026. This is a routine compensatory arrangement filing with no merger or deal-related implications.

L3_detailed.event: The Compensation Committee of Hologic's Board of Directors approved a revised form of RSU Award Agreement, effective for fiscal 2026.
L3_detailed.deal_implications: No merger or acquisition activity disclosed. This filing relates solely to executive compensation arrangements.
